name: mcp-server-development
description: Complete toolkit for building, extending, and securing MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers — covers interactive UI apps (ext-apps), OAuth authentication (ext-auth client credentials & enterprise SSO), official reference server integration, and the MCP extension negotiation system. Skills are available as VS Code Copilot prompt files under .github/copilot/*.prompt.md (local workspace use) and as installable plugin skills under skills/ (distributable format).
